name: pathfinding
description: 探路 - Travel planning app with offline-first architecture

scripts.ios: xcodebuild -project apps/ios/Pathfinding/Pathfinding.xcodeproj -scheme Pathfinding-Debug -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro Max' -derivedDataPath /tmp/pathfinding-build build && xcrun simctl install booted /tmp/pathfinding-build/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator/Pathfinding.app && xcrun simctl launch booted org.pathfinding.app.debug
scripts.ios:build: xcodebuild -project apps/ios/Pathfinding/Pathfinding.xcodeproj -scheme Pathfinding-Debug -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro Max' build
